title: my go-to glowy summer makeup look | GET READY WITH ME

questions.question: What does 'go-to' mean in the context of this makeup video?
options: A) A makeup technique for applying foundation
B) A favorite or standard choice that someone regularly uses
C) A type of cosmetic product
D) A method for blending concealer
questions.explanation: 'Go-to' 是一个常用表达，意思是"常去的"或"首选的"。在美妆视频中，'my go-to glowy summer makeup look' 指的是她最常化的夏日妆容，即她的标准/首选妆容。

questions.question: What does 'GET READY WITH ME' typically mean in a beauty video?
options: A) Wait for me to get ready
B) Watch me do my makeup while I explain the steps
C) Get ready for a surprise
questions.explanation: 'Get Ready With Me' (GRWM) 是YouTube美妆视频的常见标题，意思是博主在化妆的过程中，观众可以一起观看学习。这是一个互动性很强的视频形式。

questions.question: What does 'glowy' refer to in the context of summer makeup?
options: A) Shiny or luminous skin appearance
questions.explanation: 'Glowy' 指的是皮肤呈现出有光泽、发光的效果。这是夏日妆容的流行趋势，给人一种健康、自然的光泽感，而不是哑光或油光满面的效果。

questions.question: What is the purpose of 'contouring' mentioned in this video?
options: A) To add color to cheeks
B) To create shadows and define facial structure
D) To set makeup with powder
questions.explanation: Contouring（修容）是使用深色产品来创造阴影，从而定义和塑造面部轮廓。视频中提到使用 contour and concealer 来打造瘦脸效果，即"snatched"效果。

questions.question: According to the video, what is a 'skin tint' compared to foundation?
options: B) It's really light and beautiful, allows skin to breathe
D) It's only for dry skin types
questions.explanation: 视频中说 skin tint "it's really light really beautiful gives such a nice glow but also a nice coverage but isn't too overpowering"。Skin tint 比粉底液更轻薄，让皮肤可以自由呼吸。

questions.question: What does 'snatched' mean in the context of this makeup tutorial?
options: B) Perfectly defined and sculpted facial features
questions.explanation: 'Snatched' 是美妆界的流行语，意思是面部轮廓被完美定义和塑造，看起来非常精致。视频中说 "the snatch you get from this technique is pretty undefeated"（这个技巧带来的紧致轮廓效果非常棒）。

questions.question: What does 'buff' mean in makeup application?
options: B) To blend or smooth out product into skin
questions.explanation: 'Buff' 是美妆术语，意思是"打磨"或"融合"，即用刷子或工具将产品均匀地推开并融入皮肤，使妆容看起来更自然无缝。视频中 "I'm going to just buff it out" 就是在说要将产品晕染开。

questions.question: What is the difference between 'dewy' and 'matte' finishes?
options: A) They mean the same thing
B) Dewy is shiny/luminous, matte is flat without shine
C) Dewy is for oily skin only
questions.explanation: 'Dewy' 指的是有光泽、滋润的妆效，而 'matte' 指的是哑光、雾面的妆效。视频中多次提到 "glowy dewy Summer Skin"，说明夏日妆容追求的是有光泽的滋润感。

questions.question: What does 'buildable' coverage mean in makeup?
options: A) One layer provides full coverage
B) Product can be layered to increase coverage intensity
D) Coverage fades throughout the day
questions.explanation: 'Buildable' 指的是产品可以层层叠加，从轻薄到遮盖力强可以根据需要调整。视频中说 "this concealer is really creamy and beautiful but has really good coverage too and it's buildable"，说明这款遮瑕膏可以根据需要叠加。

questions.question: What type of product does the speaker use for under-eye area?
questions.explanation: 视频中提到在眼周区域使用遮瑕膏（concealer）。具体是在 "I'm going to go in with this hourglass Veil" 之后，使用遮瑕膏来遮盖黑眼圈和瑕疵。

questions.question: What does 'nudie' color refer to in makeup?
questions.explanation: 'Nudie' 指的是裸色或米色系，接近皮肤自然色调的颜色。视频中说 "it's like a nudie color it brings more definition to the lips"，指的是一种自然的裸色唇妆。

questions.question: Which brand is mentioned multiple times throughout this video?
questions.explanation: Hourglass 是视频中多次提到的美妆品牌。视频中提到了 Hourglass Veil（妆前乳）、Hourglass 睫毛膏、Hourglass 刷子等多款产品。

questions.question: What two blush shades does the speaker use?
options: B) Nudie beigey pink and baby ballerina pink
questions.explanation: 视频中说 "do two different blush Shades a nudie beigey pink and I like to do that first because it" 以及提到 "a little bit more of like a baby ballerina pink"，所以使用的是裸米色和婴儿芭蕾粉两种腮红。

questions.question: What is the last step mentioned in this makeup look?
questions.explanation: 视频最后提到 "the last thing I'm gonna do is my peptide lip treatment"，所以最后一个步骤是使用肽类唇部护理产品。

questions.question: What does it mean when the speaker says 'it's back' about a product?
options: A) The product has returned after being discontinued or unavailable
D) She is returning the product
questions.explanation: 视频中说 "look what's back vanilla cake" 和 "I'm so happy that it's back I really missed this scent"，这里 'it's back' 指的是这款产品之前停产或缺货，现在又重新上市了。

questions.question: What does 'seamless' mean in makeup application?
options: B) Perfectly blended with no visible edges or lines
C) Using multiple products at once
questions.explanation: 'Seamless' 意思是"无缝的"，指妆容完美融合，看不到任何边界或痕迹。视频中说 "it makes everything look really really even and seamless"，指的是产品完美融入皮肤。

questions.question: What is the purpose of bronzer in this summer makeup look?
options: B) To add warmth and sun-kissed dimension to the skin
questions.explanation: Bronzer（古铜粉/修容粉）用于为皮肤添加温暖的感觉和阳光吻过的立体感。视频中说 "almost bronzes up the skin a little bit"，目的是让皮肤看起来有阳光般的健康色泽。

questions.question: What does 'hydration packed' mean about a product?
options: B) The product contains a lot of moisturizing ingredients
C) The product is heavy on skin
questions.explanation: 'Hydration packed' 意思是"富含水分/保湿成分"，形容产品含有丰富的保湿成分。视频中说 "is so hydration packed and it looks so stunning under my makeup"，指的是妆前产品保湿效果非常好。

questions.question: Describe the skin preparation steps shown in this video and explain why they are important for a glowy summer makeup look.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，需要考生描述视频中的护肤准备步骤并解释其重要性。
questions.referenceAnswer: 1. Start with skin prep 2. Apply moisturizer 3. Use Hourglass Veil primer 4. These steps create hydrated, smooth base 5. Help makeup blend seamlessly 6. Achieve the glowy, dewy finish
questions.hint: Try to mention: skin prep, moisturizer, primer, hydration, smooth base, glowing finish

questions.question: Explain the difference between using a skin tint versus a foundation, based on what was mentioned in the video.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，需要考生解释 skin tint 和 foundation 的区别。
questions.referenceAnswer: 1. Skin tint is lighter and more natural 2. Foundation provides more coverage 3. Skin tint allows skin to breathe 4. Skin tint gives a nice glow 5. Foundation can be too heavy for summer 6. Skin tint is better for light summer makeup
questions.hint: Use words like: light coverage, natural, breathable, glowy, heavy vs light

questions.question: Describe how to achieve the 'snatched' jawline look mentioned in the video.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，需要考生描述如何打造紧致的下颚线效果。
questions.referenceAnswer: 1. Use contour product along jawline 2. Apply concealer for additional sculpting 3. Blend well using buffing technique 4. Creates definition and shadow 5. Makes face look more sculpted and lifted
questions.hint: Try to include: contour, jawline, concealer, blend, definition, technique

questions.question: What is the purpose of setting powder according to the video?
options: A) To make the skin glowier
B) To keep makeup in place and prevent it from sliding
questions.explanation: 视频中说 "like it's necessary to set my makeup"，意思是定妆粉是用来固定妆容的，防止妆面脱落或移位。虽然博主说用量不多因为想保持 glowy 效果，但定妆粉的基本作用仍是持久定妆。

questions.question: How does the speaker brush her eyebrows?
options: B) First in reverse direction, then normal direction
questions.explanation: 视频中说 "so I'm just gonna brush them up I like to go the reverse way like this and then"，意思是她喜欢先逆着眉毛方向梳，然后再顺着梳，这样可以起到更好的塑形效果。

questions.question: What does 'enhance' mean in the context of lip makeup?
options: A) To completely change lip color
B) To bring out or emphasize natural features
questions.explanation: 'Enhance' 意思是"增强"或"突出"，在美妆中指的是强调和突出自然的特征。视频中说 "kind of just like enhanced my lips"，意思是这款唇部产品让她的嘴唇看起来更立体、更有光泽。
